description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a loose, ankle-length robe with wide sleeves and a belted waist, evoking a historical or ancient style. The robe features decorative trim at the sleeves and a layered, draped appearance, giving the garment a voluminous silhouette. The figure has a full beard and medium-length, wavy hair, styled in a natural, slightly tousled manner. He is wearing simple open-toed sandals, exposing the feet. The facial expression is stern and focused, and the arms are extended horizontally to the sides. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall appearance suggests a character from a historical or theatrical context.
description: An adult male in a long, belted robe with wide sleeves, open-toed sandals, and medium-length wavy hair, styled in a historical fashion. The figure has a full beard and a stern expression, with arms extended outward.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, beard, and robe details, with arms extended and sandals visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the robe's draping, and the arm's extension.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the robe's layered back, and both arms outstretched.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile, robe's side drape, and the extended arm from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: long belted robe with wide sleeves and decorative trim
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
